shakshi: Chancellor Kelly debriefed the player in riddles following the canopy incident
The player knows the royal class is not unified on the war — not every member is aligned with Nexiott
Kelly gave the player the political history of the priesthood and how it reached its current shape
Kelly told the story of young Alfir and Eomann wandering into Mt. Hieronymus and reaching the Faewilds
Amelia named for the first time — saved Alfir and Eomann in the Faewilds as boys
Echo named for the first time — present with Amelia when the boys were found in the Faewilds
The player knows Eomann is sworn to Amelia — his oath dates to the Faewilds incident as boys
Eomann appointed Alfir to the priesthood when Alfir was in his 20s
The player knows Saffron removed Alfir as Kelly's advisor when his Fae connections became known
Nexiott's caravan business was built into the justification for the war against the Fae
Rachelle named as Alfir's student and Saffron's installed replacement advisor
Alfir trained his own replacement — Rachelle was his student before Saffron installed her
The player understands Kelly is not aligned with Nexiott's agenda
Kelly was forthcoming but remains a Chancellor who conceals things in riddles — his full motives are opaque
